steps.title: Fastest path: mark the figure first
steps.content: Mark the given angle relationships on the figure first: equal angles, vertical angles, supplementary angles, parallel-line angles, and triangle sums of $180^\circ$. Most of these questions become a short angle chase once the givens are marked.

steps.title: Correspondence from similarity
steps.content: From the similarity statement triangle CAE ~ triangle CBD, the vertices correspond in order: C↔C, A↔B, and E↔D. Therefore, angle CAE equals angle CBD.

steps.title: Compute angle CAE
steps.content: Given angle CBD = 56°, we get angle CAE = 56°. That matches Choice B — 56°.
